name: Team Katie
subject: MATCH: Help us fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4902067163877081088/-6919194787757162496?refcode=e20160614&refcode2=e20160614ndb&amount=25)
---

Friends -- the clock is ticking, so we'll keep this quick.

Our mid-June fundraising deadline is just TWO days away -- and with Katie virtually tied in the polls right now, we need to work hard and fast to put her over the top.

[**A group of generous donors just told us they would MATCH every donation, dollar for dollar, until the midnight deadline on Thursday -- will you pitch in now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4902067163877081088/-6919194787757162496?refcode=e20160614&refcode2=e20160614ndb&amount=25)

This opportunity couldn't come at a more critical time -- Pat Toomey's special interest buddies have noticed our momentum, and they're buying up millions in airtime to attack Katie's reputation.

**Quick, help us fight back. Make a donation of $5 or more before the deadline and it will be DOUBLED to reach twice as many undecided voters:**
[**Express donate $5 to make $10 impact >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4902067163877081088/-6919194787757162496?refcode=e20160614&refcode2=e20160614ndb&amount=5)

**[Express donate $25 to make $50 impact>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4902067163877081088/-6919194787757162496?refcode=e20160614&refcode2=e20160614ndb&amount=25)

[Express donate $50 to make $100 impact >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4902067163877081088/-6919194787757162496?refcode=e20160614&refcode2=e20160614ndb&amount=50)

[Express donate $100 to make $200 impact >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4902067163877081088/-6919194787757162496?refcode=e20160614&refcode2=e20160614ndb&amount=100)

[Or, donate another amount >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4902067163877081088/-6919194787757162496?refcode=e20160614&refcode2=e20160614ndb)**
Thank you,

Team Katie

| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.

Right now, every gift will be matched to make TWICE the impact. Will you chip in? Thanks.

**[Donate now](https://act.myngp.com/el/4902067163877081088/-6919194787757162496?refcode=e20160614&refcode2=e20160614ndb "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160612&refcode2=e20160612nd&amount=25")**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4902067163877081088/-6991252381795090432).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Kelly Ward, DCCC
subject: Why I’m emailing you today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | You're a strong Democrat, right?

That's why I'm emailing you. I need your help.

Paul Ryan, the Speaker of the House, just gave a big speech about his plans for our country.

His most urgent priority? "Replace every word of Obamacare." It's outrageous.

As a Democrat, my most urgent priority is fighting to take back Congress.

Your email has been shared with us because you're a strong progressive who shares this value. As a member of the DCCC's email list, we'll keep you informed about news that's important to Democrats.

And today, I need your help to fight Paul Ryan and his backwards priorities:

[**TAKE A STAND: Say you 'll fight with me to defeat Paul Ryan and the obstructionist Republicans.**](http://links.e.dccc.org/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ2NzA4ODES1&r=Mjk4Nzk5MTk4OTQ5S0&b=0&j=ODIyMDMxMzA4S0&mt=2&rj=ODIyMDMxMzA3S0&rt=0)

Thanks for your time,
Kelly****

Kelly Ward
Executive Director, DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=24670881&r=Mjk4Nzk5MTk4OTQ5S0&j=ODIyMDMxMzA4S0&l=3915434&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We are already at work preparing for what's next. Early support will be critical for building our next campaign to defeat Tea Party Republicans. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $22. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=24670881&r=Mjk4Nzk5MTk4OTQ5S0&j=ODIyMDMxMzA4S0&l=3915434&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: Congress must end gun slaughter
body:
---
Dear Activist, Once again our hearts are aching for the innocent victims of a senseless gun slaughter, this time in Orlando.

Americans overwhelmingly support common-sense gun safety measures like blocking gun sales to suspected terrorists, and reinstating the assault weapon ban. But the NRA continues to oppose _**any** _gun restrictions and the entire Republican Party blindly follows the NRA.

It's time to end this. [**Please join our friends at CREDO Action in urging Congress to take immediate steps to end gun slaughter.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126801MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14) Thanks for all you do! Bob Fertik

| |
---
**[Gun control now: Congress must ban assault weapons](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126802MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)** _Tell Republicans in Congress:_
**"It's time to put your constituents before the NRA. Bring a real gun control legislation package, which includes a ban on assault weapons, to the floor of the House and the Senate."** Add your name: | [ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126803MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)
---

Dear Friend,
[ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126804MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)
---
Another horrific mass shooting happened yesterday, leaving at least 50 dead and 50 more wounded at an LGBT club in Orlando.
As the death toll from the tragedy in Orlando continued to mount, Republican politicians were quick to offer their prayers and condolences to the families and friends of the victims.
Coming from **politicians who not only refuse to act to reduce gun violence, but who also foster and promote anti-LGBT bigotry and hate through their words, their party platform and their legislative actions, those "thoughts and prayers" don't mean much.** 1
Breaking the NRA's chokehold on Congress will require **massive grassroots pressure on our elected officials, demanding they deliver more than thoughts and prayers in the face of our epidemic of gun violence.** Can you add your voice today to tell Republican leaders to vote on a meaningful package of gun control reforms, **including an assault weapons ban?**
[**Tell Republicans in Congress: "Thoughts and prayers" are not enough. We need real gun control. Click here to sign the petition.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126805MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)
Republican members of Congress respond to gun tragedies while they're in the news. But, they don't take responsibility for how their actions, and inaction, lay the groundwork for hate crimes and gun violence, nor do they take action to prevent these tragedies from happening again. Instead, they offer up either fleeting sentiments or xenophobic and racist policies.
They need to pass real gun control now, including:
> * Closing the terror gap by allowing the Department of Justice to block guns sales to anyone on the terror watch list. Between 2004 and 2014, more than 2,000 people on the list purchased guns in the U.S.2
> * Closing the loophole that allows people to buy guns without undergoing background checks through private sales, at gun shows and online. An estimated 40 percent of all firearms transferred in the U.S. are transferred by unlicensed individuals not required to conduct background checks on buyers.3
> * Banning convicted domestic abusers and stalkers from buying guns. Abused women are five times more likely to be killed by their abuser if that individual has access to a firearm.4
> * Prohibiting the manufacture and sale of assault weapons and "large capacity" magazines for civilian use.
>

**In 2014 alone, the gun lobby spent over $30 million on political advertising and lobbying to influence legislators in Congress and state capitals across the country.** 5 If Republicans really want to protect Americans, they need to break their blind allegiance to the NRA and pass gun control legislation. But they'll never act unless we force them. Can you add your voice today?
[**Tell Republicans in Congress: It's time to pass real gun control legislation. Click here to sign the petition.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126806MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)
**When Republicans disagree with advances in women's rights, LGBT rights, or civil rights, they don't just offer their thoughts and prayers, they push legislation.** In just the last year, Republicans in Congress and in state legislatures across the country have worked to make abortion impossible to access, to discriminate against LGBT people, and to take away voting rights. At the same time, they have aggressively pushed the NRA's agenda to weaken gun laws, from campus carry to permitless carry to stand your ground.
**If all Republicans can offer after this weekend's massacre are their thoughts and prayers, or misguided scapegoating of Muslim communities that plays into their base's racism and xenophobia, that speaks volumes.** It shows that current Republican leaders in Congress lack the care, or courage, to act.
**Tell Republicans in Congress: "Thoughts and prayers" are not enough. We need real gun control. Click the link below to sign the petition:**
[**http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Orlando_Gun_Control_Dems/**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126807MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)
Thank you for your activism,
Heidi Hess, Senior Campaign Manager
[CREDO Action from Working Assets](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126808MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)
Add your name:
[ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126809MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)
---
_References:_
1. David Weigel, "[Few Republicans mention LGBT community in Orlando reactions](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126810MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)," Washington Post, June 12, 2016 and Jennifer Bendery and Matt Fuller, "[Republicans Kill Spending Bill Over Its LGBT Protections](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126811MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)," HuffingtonPost.com, May 26, 2016.
2. "[Closing the Terror Gap in Gun Background Checks](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126812MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)," Everytown for Gun Safety, July 21, 2015.
3. "[Universal Background Checks & the "Private" Sale Loophole Policy Summary ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126813MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)," Law Center to Prevent Gun Violence, September 10, 2015.
4. "[Gabby Giffords, National Domestic Violence Prevention Leaders Applaud New House Legislation to Keep Guns out of the Hands of Abusers](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126814MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)," Americans for Responsible Solutions, July 22, 2015.
5. Ben Geier, "[NRA's Massive Political Spending Gains Attention](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126815MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-14)," Fortune, December 3, 2015.

* * *
Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 3 million supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace. We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations. Please join us at **[Democrats.com](http://democrats.com)**! You are subscriber #10036727 to Democrats.com Activist Alerts.
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L47) if you do not want future messages from CREDO Action.
If you do not want messages from any of our partners [click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=noads).
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L1) to permanently unsubscribe from all Democrats.com lists.

name: Paul Schoonover
subject: Matt's story
body:
| Peter -- The Portman for Senate campaign recently released a series of TV ads - “[Wildfire](https://www.robportman.com/watch_our_ads_on_ohio_s_addiction_epidemic?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_blast&n=1)," “[Holly](https://www.robportman.com/watch_our_ads_on_ohio_s_addiction_epidemic?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_blast&n=2),” “[Gina](https://www.robportman.com/watch_our_ads_on_ohio_s_addiction_epidemic?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_blast&n=3),” and "[Tyler](https://www.robportman.com/watch_our_ads_on_ohio_s_addiction_epidemic?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_blast&n=4)" \- highlighting Rob Portman's leadership in fighting the prescription drug and heroin epidemic in Ohio.

Our family, too, has been devastated by the horrific disease of addiction. We lost our 21-year-old son Matt to an accidental heroin overdose in 2012. Matt loved sports growing up. His favorite was baseball, and he played first base at Worthington Christian High School. He started using prescription pain pills his freshman year of college and eventually became addicted to heroin.

Rob has been a leader in the fight against drug abuse. He truly cares about fighting addiction, and he's getting things done. His legislation to combat the opioid crisis passed the Senate 94-1, and it will save lives by helping those battling opiate addiction get the treatment they need.

[](https://www.robportman.com/watch_our_ads_on_ohio_s_addiction_epidemic?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_blast&n=5)
I trust Rob Portman, and we need to do all we can to make sure he gets re-elected to the Senate so he can continue to lead the fight against heroin addiction. [Click here](https://www.robportman.com/watch_our_ads_on_ohio_s_addiction_epidemic?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_blast&n=6) to learn more about our Matt's story and why our family is supporting Rob Portman. Sincerely, Paul Schoonover [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_blast&n=7)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_blast&n=8)

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_blast&n=9). -=-=-

name: Chris Koster
subject: Who I'm fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-921025054294800384/950681234710071296?utm_campaign=adv_labor_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16160614advlaborgqfulck&refcode=em16160614advlaborgqfulck)

Hi,
I love being on the campaign trail. I get to make new friends and catch up with old ones. Missouri families tell me about their dreams and concerns. I continue to learn the stories of communities, large and small, across the state.

Last week, I had the opportunity to visit with Missouri's some of the dedicated workers who have built our state and will continue to pave the way for our growth in the 21st Century. They're working hard for the greater good of every Missouri community.

Like all of the working families in Missouri, they're who this campaign is about.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-921025054294800384/950681234710071296?utm_campaign=adv_labor_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16160614advlaborgqfulck&refcode=em16160614advlaborgqfulck)

As Governor, I'll work every day to lift up the voices of Missouri's working families. It's long past time for the General Assembly to put the grandstanding aside and focus on policies that make Missouri's economy work for everyone.

To make this happen, I need your help. [**Sign my petition calling on the General Assembly to reject legislation to lower wages in our state.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-921025054294800384/950681234710071296?utm_campaign=adv_labor_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16160614advlaborgqfulck&refcode=em16160614advlaborgqfulck)

Thank you for standing with me,

Chris Koster

**[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/-921025054294800384/1094796422785927168?utm_campaign=fnd_labor_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160614_fnd_gq_labor_ful__ck) **
**
Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
---
**
**
Koster for Missouri
PO Box 1551
Jefferson City MO 65102 United States
**
**If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-921025054294800384/878623640672143360).**

name: Bullock HQ
subject: checkbook vs grassroots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

We will say this over and over again. Greg Gianforte has his checkbook. We have grassroots supporters like you. This gives us the clear advantage.

You may have seen the press coverage recently -- Mr. Gianforte's campaign sent out calls that repeatedly mispronounced "Helena"... you know, Montana's capital city... the place he wants to govern. Remarkably, we learned that he likely spent thousands of dollars with an out-of-state firm to make these calls.

**It 's checkbook vs grassroots. Our campaign is going to be based on Montanans talking to Montanans about what is at stake in this election.** Whether it's concern over access to public lands and streams, support for public education and higher ed, or just appreciation for Steve's fiscal responsibility and ability to get things done, thousands of folks across the state are stepping up to donate their time and money to ensure we keep him in the governor's office.

**[If you know how to pronounce"Helena" and think that the governor should be elected by people who do as well, please chip in $15 today.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=DIguu%2BdYPCJenPjqmme726Wd3oRp6Ita)**

We're now in the general election and have set a HUGE grassroots fundraising goal of $15,000 before our next June financial deadline. Greg Gianforte has the thousands of dollars he paid people to make calls on his behalf. We have supporters like you.

**[Please be counted and donate $15 now.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=bshIfXfWaXYbrJ6iYT2ktKWd3oRp6Ita)**

Thanks,
Bullock HQ
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CZ117Dj9DDX0R3JLXydj7qWd3oRp6Ita)
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=EIrIkEPFVD00f8RHPgCTXaWd3oRp6Ita).

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)
clean_body: Friend, We will say this over and over again. Greg Gianforte has his checkbook. We have grassroots supporters like you. This gives us the clear advantage. You may have seen the press coverage recently -- Mr. Gianforte's campaign sent out calls that repeatedly mispronounced "Helena"... you know, Montana's capital city... the place he wants to govern. Remarkably, we learned that he likely spent thousands of dollars with an out-of-state firm to make these calls. It 's checkbook vs grassroots. Our campaign is going to be based on Montanans talking to Montanans about what is at stake in this election. Whether it's concern over access to public lands and streams, support for public education and higher ed, or just appreciation for Steve's fiscal responsibility and ability to get things done, thousands of folks across the state are stepping up to donate their time and money to ensure we keep him in the governor's office. We're now in the general election and have set a HUGE grassroots fundraising goal of $15,000 before our next June financial deadline. Greg Gianforte has the thousands of dollars he paid people to make calls on his behalf. We have supporters like you. Thanks, Bullock HQ | | Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: The political revolution continues
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Washington, D.C. votes today in the final contest of the Democratic primary. Our staff and volunteers are working hard for every vote and every delegate in the District of Columbia because each is an important declaration of support for the values we share, and the issues that have powered our campaign.
When we started this campaign, I told you that I was running not to oppose any man or woman, but to propose new and far-reaching policies to deal with the crises of our time. And for the past fourteen months, through the entire primary process, we've sent the establishment a message they can't ignore: we won't settle for the status quo.
After today, the voting is done, but our political revolution continues.
**I want to talk to you directly onThursday night about what's next for our campaign in a live, online video address at 8:30 p.m. EDT / 5:30 p.m. PDT. I hope that you will join:**
[**Sign up to RSVP to watch my live, online video message on Thursday night and we 'll send you a text message or email shortly before the event begins.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/live?source=em160614 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/live?source=em160614")
This campaign is about more than Bernie Sanders. It is about all of us together. It is about millions of people from coast to coast knowing that we can do much better as a nation.
I hope that you will join the conversation on Thursday night and ask your friends to do the same.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[RSVP TO JOIN»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/live?source=em160614 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/live?source=em160614")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Jay Inslee
subject: 7 million Washington hearts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Our hearts are heavy.

Friend,

On Saturday, I was honored to celebrate the 25th anniversary of the LGBTQ Pride Parade in Spokane. Yet the very next day, we woke up to learn about the horrific tragedy that unfolded in Orlando.

Our hearts are heavy this week as we think about the tragic events in Florida.

There are 7 million Washington hearts with the people of Orlando and the LGBTQ community across the world. As we grapple with this senseless act of hate, we must stand together to offer a bit of light and hope in response to darkness.

[Photo from the vigil in Seattle, where hundreds came together to stand against hate and terror.]

On Sunday, I joined hundreds of Washingtonians in Seattle for a vigil honoring the victims of this attack. Let us respond to this tragedy with love, compassion, and empathy in the face of intolerance and hate. Washington state stands in solidarity with Orlando.
Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTA1Njc0NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTQxMzY2MTY2S0&mt=1&rt=0.

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. All content (c) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved 2016.

PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111

Privacy Policy http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTA1Njc0NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTQxMzY2MTY2S0&mt=1&rt=0

Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington

name: VanHollen.org
subject: Sign your name to demand action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

Friend, did you see Chris's email yesterday?

Even in the wake of a string of tragic mass shootings, Republicans are still refusing to consider measures that would make it harder for killers to acquire military style weapons.

[**Please join Chris to demand Republicans allow a vote on an assault weapons ban and help our country take action that could save lives >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dc3/70cdc2ba/47f7e0b3/397293c/1962248731/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-congress-act-on-gun-control?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+join+Chris+to+demand+Republicans+&utm_campaign=em061416&source=em061416")

Begin forwarded message:

> Friend,
>
> Once again our country was jolted by a new act of hate-filled terror this weekend -- directed this time at the LGBT community. Once again we are seeing tragic, heart-breaking images coming from an American city.
>
> This act of apparent homegrown terror could have many roots. Only a full investigation will tell the complete story. But one thing is for sure -- the terrorist who attacked innocents in Orlando would not have been able to gun down so many so quickly without his assault weapon. We cannot afford to overlook this fact.
>
> [**Please add your name and urge Republicans in Congress to allow a vote on an assault weapons ban on the floor of the House and the Senate.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dc3/70cdc2ba/47f7e0b3/397293d/1962248731/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-congress-act-on-gun-control?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+add+your+name+and+urge+Republican&utm_campaign=em061416&source=em061416")
>
> Easy access to military style weapons has made us the mass shooting capital of the world. It should be crystal clear that we can no longer afford to turn a blind eye to the mayhem caused in community after community by these specialized instruments of death in the hands of killers.
>
> We are all in this together and we must find a way to take action that protects lives. As we mourn for all those lost and their families, and for those who will bear the scars of this heinous act for the rest of their lives, let us also work together to get something done.
>
> That is my commitment. Will you make it yours?
>
> [**Please add your name and demand that we ban assault weapons once and for all.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dc3/70cdc2ba/47f7e0b3/397293a/1962248731/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-congress-act-on-gun-control?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+add+your+name+and+demand+that+we+&utm_campaign=em061416&source=em061416")
>
> We cannot afford to be silent,
>
> Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dc3/70cdc2ba/47f7e0b3/397293b/1962248731/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em061416&source=em061416") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Here’s how Trump responds to a crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Trump's behavior in the past 48 hours | Friend --

After this weekend’s horrific shooting in Orlando, Donald Trump showed us exactly what kind of president he would be.

First, he went on Twitter to congratulate himself for calling the shooting an act of “radical Islamic terrorism.”

Second, he implied that President Obama secretly sympathizes with terrorists.

Third, he doubled down on his proposal to ban all Muslim people from entering the United States.

And last night, he stripped press credentials from the _Washington Post_ so that their reporters will no longer be allowed to cover his campaign events.

Trump’s behavior in the past 48 hours is a direct preview of what he would do if he's elected.

**And right now, there’s only one thing standing between Trump and the White House: all of us. Chip in to the Stop Trump Fund, get your free Team Hillary sticker, and let’s build a campaign strong enough to beat Trump this November:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU3Mzc5NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMTQyOTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

|
**Donald Trump is the presumptive Republican nominee. This is the only team that can stop him -- chip in $1 to help take Trump on:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU3Mzc5NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyMTQyOTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Orlando
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Grieving for those we lost in this attack. | Friend, On Saturday, we joined our friends in the LGBTQ community for Milwaukee's annual Pridefest -- a huge celebration of love and community. We walked the fairgrounds and met with people from all walks of life, people who had come together for one simple purpose: to celebrate and express pride in our diverse community. Fewer than 12 hours later, we heard the horrifying news about the tragedy in Orlando. A gunman entered an LGBTQ club and murdered 49 people and wounded over 50 -- most of whom were people of color. My heart is so heavy. I'm grieving for those we lost in this hateful attack, and for their families, friends, and loved ones. I'm grieving for the LGBTQ community across the nation as they mourn their brothers and sisters. We must stand together and recommit ourselves to ensuring that all Americans -- no matter who they are or whom they love -- are able to live freely and without fear of violence. We cannot allow our nation to succumb to hate. To my LGBTQ friends, neighbors, and all Americans: know that you are loved, that you are valued, and that you are in my thoughts. Sincerely, Russ Feingold
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4300/1c469400/68bad5c/3567d25/3034901358/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4300/1c469400/68bad5c/3567d22/3034901358/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4300/1c469400/68bad5c/3567d23/3034901358/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---

My heart is so heavy. I'm grieving for those we lost in this hateful attack, and for their families, friends, and loved ones. I'm grieving for the LGBTQ community across the nation as they mourn their brothers and sisters. We must stand together and recommit ourselves to ensuring that all Americans -- no matter who they are or whom they love -- are able to live freely and without fear of violence. We cannot allow our nation to succumb to hate. To my LGBTQ friends, neighbors, and all Americans: know that you are loved, that you are valued, and that you are in my thoughts. Sincerely, Russ Feingold
